title: First Week After a Death Checklist
summary: Priorities for the week following a loss — still lighter than most families expect.

tasks.title: Finalize funeral or memorial plans
tasks.explanation: Ask the funeral home for an itemized price list.

tasks.title: Check for any written wishes the person left
tasks.explanation: Sometimes in estate documents, sometimes a separate note.

tasks.title: Set up mail forwarding or holding
Handle perishables, plants, and pets
tasks.explanation: if the home will be less occupied.

tasks.title: Notify an employer, if time off is needed
tasks.explanation: A brief, factual message is enough.

tasks.title: Start a single running list to track tasks and accounts
tasks.notes: Sets up the following weeks' larger workload.

tasks.title: Order more death certificate copies than seems necessary
tasks.who: Funeral home or state vital records.
